axes.notes: Covers WebSocket, restore, MCP message send, reply_to_leader, webhook, open_agent command/kickoff, replay, paste/submit, stale target, and AI TUI idle invariant.
Dynamic import keeps RED failure runtime-scoped; future implementation contract checks are centralized in a shared harness.
Uses the 26 sidecar test symbols for FR-MCP-002 AC-1..AC-6, IR-MCP-004 AC-1..AC-10, IR-MCP-005 AC-1..AC-10.
